info.name: School Management API
info.description:
API collection for the School Management internship assignment.

Endpoints:
- POST /addSchool — Add a new school
- GET /listSchools — List schools sorted by proximity
- GET /health — Server health check

Set the `baseUrl` variable to switch between local and live environments.

variable.description: Switch to your EC2 public IP for production: http://YOUR_EC2_IP:3000

request.description: Verify the server is running. Returns uptime in seconds.
Adds a new school. All four fields are required. Latitude must be -90 to 90, longitude -180 to 180.
Demonstrates validation — missing address, latitude, longitude.

response.name: 400 Bad Request

request.description: Latitude 999 is out of range — must be -90 to 90.

response.name: 400 Bad Request

request.description: Returns all schools sorted nearest-first from Delhi coordinates. distance_km is calculated server-side using the Haversine formula.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Same data, different user location — ordering changes.
Missing longitude — demonstrates query param validation.

response.name: 400 Bad Request
